title: Operations Executive, Auto Loans Department
description:
Operations Executive, Auto Loans Department

  • Full-Time, Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM
  • Work Location: Newton
  • Be part of a stable, established financial services environment

About the Role

We are looking for a meticulous and proactive Operations Executive to support the Financial Services operations team. You’ll play a key role in maintaining documentation, processing loan transactions, and ensuring operational accuracy across the business.

Key Responsibilities:

Operational Support

  • Provide administrative and operational support to the Financial Services, Automotive loans team
  • Collate, update, and maintain all operational documentation
  • Prepare and deliver regular operational reports   

Loan Processing & Data Management

  • Process loan disbursements and perform accurate data entry
  • Check and verify loan documentation before payment
  • Create and maintain loan accounts
  • Update customer information in the system (e.g., GIRO arrangements, change of address, vehicle number updates)

Required Experience, Competencies and Skills:     

  • Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in auto loans, hire purchase, or financial operations preferred
  • At least GCE O‑Level qualification
  • Proficient in MS Office applications
  • Meticulous, organized, and able to manage multiple tasks effectively
  • Able to work independently with minimal supervision
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills
  • Proactive, positive, and willing to learn
  • Ability to communicate in Chinese (Mandarin) to liaise with Mandarin‑speaking clients and business partners

✅ Ready to Take the Next Step? Apply Now!

If you’re looking for a stable role where your attention to detail and operational strengths truly matter, we’d love to hear from you.

📨 Submit your application and résumé to us today and be part of our dynamic Financial Services team.

ANTARES MANAGEMENT SERVICES PTE. LTD.

postedCompany.description:
Antares Management Services Pte. Ltd. is a comprehensive business solutions provider specializing in manpower recruitment and business process outsourcing (BPO). As a trusted partner for companies looking to scale operations efficiently and compliantly, we deliver tailored, end-to-end solutions that support every stage of business growth.

Our recruitment capabilities span permanent placements, executive search, contract staffing, and project-based deployments. 


In the BPO space, Antares supports critical back-office and operational functions such as payroll and statutory compliance, finance processing, customer service, and IT support, enabling clients to focus on their core competencies while we manage the rest.

At Antares, our mission is to empower businesses with the talent, tools, and operational excellence needed to thrive in a dynamic and competitive environment.
